metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by nhangen — Obsidian integration, token analytics, knowledge graph, and documentation scanning

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commits, save sessions, query past work with /recall, export conversations. Supports user-defined VAULT.md conventions.

plugins.name: token-scope
plugins.description: Token spend analytics and cost alerts for Claude Code. 14 report modes including cache intelligence, tooling analysis by layer, auto-checkpoint hook for session cost control.

plugins.name: claude-mem-graph
plugins.description: Causal tracing layer over claude-mem. Extracts informed_by edges from observation narratives to trace what led to what. Cross-project search, session arc tracking, file history. 5 MCP tools, 10 edge types.

plugins.name: ceo
plugins.description: Autonomous CEO agent. Reads Obsidian vault, dispatches 6 specialized subagents, 7 playbooks, 7 skills, cron execution pipeline with three-phase tier enforcement. CLI with setup/doctor/test.

plugins.name: md-scanner
plugins.description: Behavioral markdown documentation scanner. Analyzes session history to find gaps in CLAUDE.md, rules, and memory files. Detects repeated file reads, command failures, recurring user corrections, and more. Guided walkthrough to approve/skip/defer recommendations.
